network_summary: William W. Li, DDS is the OWNER/DENTIST-OWNER of three Chicago-area dental entities per federal NPPES authorized-official records: All Family Dental (60616, solo/org-only NPI, provider_count=0, may be dormant), Damen North Dental Group Ltd (60622, 4 GP/endo providers), and Oral Kare Ltd (60657, 2 GP + 2 pediatric providers). Data Axle officer records for Oral Kare corroborate 'William W Li' as owner. No MSO, management-services entity, DSO platform, or PE-sponsor evidence found across three web searches. This is a dentist-owned private multi-location group.
owner_operator_identity: William W. Li, DDS — listed as OWNER (All Family Dental, Oral Kare Ltd) and DENTIST/OWNER (Damen North Dental Group Ltd) on NPPES authorized-official field; corroborated as owner in Data Axle officer records for Oral Kare Ltd

NPPES AO WILLIAM LI, DDS (title=DENTIST/OWNER) on NPI 1083623201 (Damen North Dental Group Ltd, 60622)
NPPES AO WILLIAM LI, DDS (title=OWNER) on NPI 1689683344 (Oral Kare Ltd, 60657)

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: All Family Dental (location_id 6a1f034a027ef384, 60616): practices table shows entity_classification=org_only_npi with num_providers=1 (org NPI only), provider_count=0 in practice_locations — may be a dormant or billing-shell location. It counts in the 60616 GP denominator (practice_locations.entity_classification=solo_established, is_specialist_only=0) but has no active individual providers currently listed at this address. Downstream gate should verify whether this location is actively operating or should be flagged for stale/dormant review.
evidence_chain: AO signal: WILLIAM LI, DDS appears as authorized official (title OWNER or DENTIST/OWNER) on 3 org NPIs across ZIPs 60616, 60622, 60657. Documentary corroboration: (1) Data Axle officer records for Oral Kare Ltd (NPI 1689683344) explicitly list 'William W Li' with title=Owner, confirming the NPPES AO is the actual owner-of-record, not merely a billing/admin contact. (2) NPPES authorized_official_title='DENTIST/OWNER' on Damen North Dental Group NPI makes the dual dentist+owner role explicit. (3) Web searches (oralkaredental.com, damennorthdental.com confirmed as active practice websites) show no MSO/DSO/PE platform association. No franchise_name, no da_legal_name (corporate parent), no PE sponsor in any of the three NPI records. Conclusion: dentist-owned multi-location private group.
future_app_notes: 1. Verify whether All Family Dental (60616, provider_count=0, org_only_npi in practices) is actively operating — could be a dormant predecessor location or billing shell. 2. Oral Kare Ltd has pediatric specialists (1223P0221X) on 2 of 4 providers — practice is mixed GP+peds, is_specialist_only=0 so it counts in GP denominator, but downstream should note the mixed taxonomy. 3. If the 60616 location is confirmed dormant, consider reclassifying to solo_inactive or org_only_npi at the practice_locations level to remove it from the GP denominator. 4. Da_ein2=363983771 on Oral Kare Ltd — could be investigated for any cross-entity EIN linkage.

classifications.reasoning: NPPES lists WILLIAM LI, DDS as OWNER on this org NPI. However, no individual providers are currently associated with this address (provider_count=0, org_only_npi in the practices table). The location counts in the 60616 GP denominator via practice_locations solo_established classification, but it may be dormant or a legacy billing entity. Corroboration via DA officer records (at Oral Kare) confirms Li is a real owner in this network, so dentist_multi is the correct tier. gate_status=candidate rather than ready_for_validation because this specific location's active-practice status is uncertain and the corroborating documentary evidence (DA officers) is for a different location in the cluster.
